entry.title: Technical object breakdown app.no data found. try adjusting the search or filter parameters
entry.content:
We are using the "Technical Object Breakdown" app in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.
Even after selecting a wide range of valid filters, the system shows:

 

"No data found. Try adjusting the search or filter parameters."

 

Steps tried:
- Used valid date ranges
- Verified breakdown maintenance notifications exist with malfunction start/end
- Checked that Breakdown indicator is selected
- Previewed relevant CDS views (C_TechnicalObjectBreakdown) in View Browser – still no data

 

Please advise whether any additional configuration or role/authorization is required.

 

Tenant: Customize tenant

entry.title: Re: Upgrade SAP Cloud Connector in High Availability Environments with Windows OS
entry.content: Very Nice explanation and helpful Blog.

entry.title: Re: In AMDP, is it possible to use a SEQUENCE object? (ne...
entry.content: Hello @Sandra_Rossi, As a HANA expert rather than an ABAP expert, I conducted some research and found the following information for your reference: https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-US/index.htm?file=abenamdp.html Currently, AMDP only supports database procedures and functions from the SAP HANA database. It appears HANA SEQUENCE is not supported. (maybe I am wrong) Best regards, Charles

entry.title: Re: Subject: Link in Outlook Calendar Invite Not Loading...
entry.content: Hi PL1, Instead of loading the intended page, the calendar link consistently redirected to the same Approval Workflow Details page. However, we’ve now identified the root cause—the issue stemmed from our preview setting, which wasn't connecting properly to Outlook. This misconfiguration caused the calendar links to override and redirect to a default Workflow Details definition each time.

entry.title: Re: SAP BusinessObjects BI 2029 is confirmed
entry.content:
Hi,

Will it be supported or integrated with SAP BDC ?

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Como foi o primeiro SAP Meetup no Rio de Janeiro
entry.content: Foi bom demais estar com vocês!!!

entry.title: Re: About WBS Element on Professional Service
entry.content: Hi Y_T,

entry.title: Re: About WBS Element on Professional Service
entry.content: Professional services - Plan customer projects app ,EPPM - Enterprise projects-Project control app

entry.title: Battery Tech Driving Clean Energy
entry.content:
Hello,
Battery technology is revolutionizing the energy sector, enabling reliable storage of renewable power and reducing dependence on fossil fuels. This topic explores innovations like solid-state batteries, lithium-silicon cells, and flow batteries, highlighting their roles in electric vehicles, grid stabilization, and off-grid systems. We'll discuss environmental trade-offs, raw material sourcing, recycling strategies, and performance benchmarks. As countries transition to sustainable energy, understanding energy storage’s role in balancing supply and demand is key. Advancements in battery efficiency, safety, and scalability could unlock a future powered by clean, uninterrupted energy. This technology is vital for realizing climate goals and empowering global energy access. paybyplatema

Best Regards,
Julie Batson

entry.title: ABAP CDS - C_CostCenterPlanActQ2001
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

Need help to analyze the standard CDS - C_CostCenterPlanActQ2001

When I open proivew in Eclipse I can see set of parameter define in this view.

But same CDS when I open in AFO or RSRT, I can see additional parameter (Like Ledger Fiscal year) which is mandatory and restrciting the output for the selection. PFA.

Please help me to identify where this additional parameter is maintained.

Thank You

Vinod

SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Data and Analytics SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office

entry.title: Re: About WBS Element on Professional Service
entry.content:
Hi Y_T, 
Yes, you are correct. Besides, you can make Professional Services projects in "Plan Customer Projects" and "Plan Internal Projects" apps directly.
Refer to help documents below.
Professional Services projects:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/29cf986299714386847f4d4c9bb86994/b102965653691e5ee10000000a4450e5.html?locale=en-US
EPPM:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/f369b2eff700401494ba6e7c9a573288/985c49588e0a0a02e10000000a44147b.html?locale=en-US

Best regardfs,
Dianne

entry.title: Re: Need to know inf how quantities are calculated when c...
entry.content:
Couple of questions:-

  • Is GR posted for the second lot? if not, MIRO will consider PO quantity only
  • Is "GR-Based Invoice Verification" ticked in PO?

entry.title: Re: Plateau Report Designer LMS - Error dataset at initia...
entry.content:
Hello  @daniela_pontes63,

Firstly, you should have the Report_Developer role assigned to you. If this role is not assigned, kindly assign it to the admin account or if it is not available in your test instance raise a case with SAP to enable the same.

Then you can follow this KBA to connect PRD with LMS: 2171592 - Process to enable the use of Plateau/Learning Report Designer (PRD) - SAP for Me

The error you are facing is usually when you have not already connected PRD with LMS database.

 If this information helped you then please consider giving Kudos or accepting this post as solution.

Swapnil

entry.title: Re: PR Integration via WebService in CIG configured site
entry.content: Hello @JakubC2, can you please provide clarity on this request? Do you want to use web service integration for importing requisitions from a third party systems into Ariba and also use CIG to import requisitions from ERP into Ariba at the same time or do you want to use web service integration for importing requisitions from a third party systems into Ariba and use CIG to integrate the PO export request of this imported requisition to the ERP?

entry.title: Re: Set Master Warranty and warranty start date automatic...
entry.content:
Hello

we are facing the same issue. Is there already a solution for or how can this be solved?

regards

entry.title: Re: Ariba Collaboration Request Conditions
entry.content: The request is not possible out of the box. However, you can reach out to SAP Ariba services and explore customization feasibility to achieve this requirement.

entry.title: Re: Applying different recording dictionary to recording
entry.content: I usually modify the Standard dictionary, exactly to avoid the issue described by the OP, because relying on content developers to select the correct dictionary has never been reliable mechanism. After customizing the Standard Recording Dictionary, I create a copy of it, so when SAP updates SEN, we can restore our customizations from this "backup".

entry.title: Re: Auto printing issue while adding marketing documents
entry.content: FYIP,

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to prevent deletion of requisitions by...
entry.content: This is unfortunately not possible both through out of the box configurations or through customizations as button actions like delete are hard coded and cannot be altered.

entry.title: Re: Technical object breakdown app.no data found. try adjusting the search or filter parameters
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: Sales order change header data Partners tab
entry.content: Thanks Raymond for your response. I will get back to you on this.

entry.title: Re: Applying different recording dictionary to recording
entry.content: ...and apply the customizations to the Standard dictionary, so that content developers do not need to switch manually to the customized one. Now, when SAP Enable Now doesn't receive any further major updates, it might be the best and safest option. Of course, keep your custom dictionary as a "backup".

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - How to Setup Secure HTTP Inbound Connection with Client Certificates
entry.content:
Hello Durga 

please open a ticket on LOD-HCI-PI-CON-SOAP and share the details, like integration flow, user-certificate mapping etc.

Please note that the client certificate configuration directly in the integration flow is not the recommended option how to use client certificate authentication. 

Best regards

Mandy

entry.title: Re: Please tell me how to check which users IT Contact is...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for your question.

Can you please check whether the following information solves your issue?

To check which user is currently set as the IT Contact in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, you can follow these steps:

Checking IT Contact in SAP for Me

  1. Log in to SAP for Me: Use your S-user ID or SAP Universal ID to log in.
  2. Access Systems & Provisioning Dashboard: Navigate to the ‘Systems & Provisioning’ section.
  3. View Assigned Tenants and Administrators: Identity and Access Management - Frequently Asked Questions Here, you can see the overview of the products you’re entitled to and check the Cloud Identity Services - Tenants overview to identify the IT Contact.

Other Ways to Check IT Contact

  • Cloud System Notification Subscription: You can subscribe to cloud availability notifications to receive updates regarding your SAP Cloud services, which might include information about the IT Contact.
  • Contact SAP Support: If you are unable to find the information through SAP for Me, you can create a support incident requesting details about the current IT Contact.

If you need to change the IT Contact, you can use the onboarding token or create a support incident with the subject ‘Request update to the Contact Person IT’. Identity and Access Management - Frequently Asked Questions

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: About WBS Element on Professional Service
entry.content: Hi, Dianne. Thank you for your comment. Rely on your and Shubham's advice, I could finally done to make project with WBS hierarchy. Sincerely, Y_T

entry.title: Re: estricting Invoice Quantity Field to Whole Numbers in...
entry.content: Yes, this can be done. You will need to log a case and request the scale field on the Invoice class to be set to 0. If a decimal value is inputted on the quantity field, then the system will throw a hard stop error.

entry.title: Re: 【sap public cloud】BUSINESS_PARTNER POST ERROR
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for your question.

Can you please check whether the following information solves your error?

Possible Causes and Solutions for the Error

The error message ‘Error while parsing an XML stream: BOM / charset detection failed’ suggests that there might be an issue with the character encoding or the presence of a Byte Order Mark (BOM) in the data being sent from Talend to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud API.

Causes:

  1. Character Encoding:

    • The data might be encoded in a format that is not expected by the API, such as UTF-16 instead of UTF-8.

  2. Byte Order Mark (BOM):

    • A BOM might be present at the beginning of the JSON data, which can cause issues during parsing.

Solutions:

  1. Check Encoding Settings:

    • Ensure that the JSON data is encoded in UTF-8, which is typically expected by APIs.

  2. Remove BOM:

    • If a BOM is present, remove it from the JSON data before sending it to the API.

  3. Validate JSON Format:

    • Double-check the JSON format to ensure it is correctly structured and matches the expected payload format for the API.

  4. Use Postman as a Reference:

    • Since the data works in Postman, compare the headers and body format used in Postman with those in Talend to identify any discrepancies.

Additional Tips

  • Debugging: Use logging or debugging tools in Talend to inspect the exact payload being sent and ensure it matches the successful request made in Postman.
  • Consult Documentation: Refer to the SAP API documentation for any specific requirements regarding data format and encoding.

By addressing these potential issues, you should be able to resolve the error and successfully add supplier master data using Talend.

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: "Quantity could not be Changed from to" error when submitting the Ariba Purchase requi
entry.content: Can you please provide more information on the error message you are getting including screenshots?

entry.title: TCS 206C (1) on Purchase of goods
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

My client wants to do configuration regarding TCS on Purchase of Goods for 206C (1) with no threshold limit. I assigned TCS on withholding tax codes and even updated in master data in SAP public cloud but when I try to do testing in FB60, codes are not getting reflected. 

Can you please guide me how to do it.

Thanks, and Regards,
GR

entry.title: Re: Modify statement in a determination giving short dump...
entry.content: Thanks for the response but I also want to add the determination during update mode, is that not possible?

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to obtain native SQL query that is exe...
entry.content:
Hi @YuriiPlakhtii,


I think you can find the SQL statement by enabling SQL trace in the target HANA database.
You can find more detailed steps about enabling SQL trace in KBA 2031647 - How to enable SQL Trace in SAP HANA Studio

Best regards,
Charles

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS - C_CostCenterPlanActQ2001
entry.content: I think belo wcode is adding the additinal parameter during run time. But then How can I modify it as I need to add column for previous year i.e user will enter Ledger Fiscal Year to get Amout restrcited to that Year, and I want to add one more parameter say Previous Year which will sho wthem previous year amount (2024). CUrrently it is filtering the whole data set for 2025 and no records of 2024 are getting in. @AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #FREE @Consumption.filter: { selectionType: #INTERVAL, multipleSelections: true, mandatory: true } @Consumption.derivation: { lookupEntity: 'I_CalendarDate', resultElement: 'CalendarYear', binding: [ { targetElement : 'CalendarDate' , type : #PARAMETER, value : 'P_KeyDate' } ] } @AnalyticsDetails.query.variableSequence: 20 LedgerFiscalYear,

entry.title: SAP Ariba supplier accounts
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have one query related to supplier accounts on SAP Business network, where supplier A have multiple contacts like X,Y,Z.... but supplier A already connected with customer ABC with supplier contact X, so that in SLP 360 for supplier A , only one contact X is showing public other contacts Y,Z are showing private.

Here my question is, when a customer ABC invite a supplier A with contact Y for sourcing event, whether he needs to create another account to complete sourcing event or he use existing account to access event.

what If he create another account, the ANID will be same or different?

I believe that one supplier have one ANID which connect all supplier contacts.

entry.title: chillSAP × JSUG Next-Gen Boost 若手LT大会
entry.content:
※イベントの申し込み、詳細情報は以下ページより行ってください
https://community.sap.com/t5/tokyo-blog-posts/chillsap-next-gen-boost-%E8%8B%A5%E6%89%8Blt%E5%A4%A7%E4%BC%9A-%E9%96%8B%E5%82%AC/ba-p/14146560


日時：2025/9/19（金） 18:30～

会場：株式会社シグマクシス コラボレーションスペース
〒105-0001 東京都港区虎ノ門４丁目１−２８ 13F
マップ：https://www.sigmaxyz.com/ja/company/about.html

対象：SAPに関わる若手メンバー（登壇も視聴参加も歓迎！）& SAPにかかわるベテランメンバー（見守って！）

登壇形式：LT形式（5〜10分程度の発表）

定員：登壇者 8名　参加者 30名

entry.title: Re: External Supplier review/approval in Service Entry Sh...
entry.content: The only way this can be achieved is by creating a user ID for the supplier and then adding this user ID to the approval flow. Unfortunately, there is no existing functionality to allow a supplier to log in to Ariba, view the SES, and approve it before sending it to the buyer.

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite: File not archived correctly post processing
entry.content:
Hello Community,

In Production instance, message was processed and posted in SAP system via SAP-Integration Suite. However, the file was not archived correctly.

Due to these, SAP CPI continued to pick the file and try to process it again and again. The interface pricks triplet to process the file. The three files are filename.xml, filename.txt and filename.pdf. The last two files were archived by the filename.xml was not processed correctly. 

Error Details:

org.apache.camel.CamelExchangeException: Error occurred during aggregation. Exchange[BF06DD831FBA19F-0000000000000002]. Caused by: [org.apache.camel.RuntimeExchangeException - Polling with given parameters did not return any message.], cause: org.apache.camel.RuntimeExchangeException: Polling with given parameters did not return any message.

These is the second time when the post processing of file was not done correctly by SAP CI. What could be the issue and how these can be averted.

 

Regards

Nageshwarnath Mishra

entry.title: Re: Unable to Find "SAP Analytics Cloud" under Service Ma...
entry.content:
Hi Vijay,

Request SAC Trial Separately

SAP offers a 30-day SAC trial via this link:

  • https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/analytics-cloud/trial.html

regards,

Giri

entry.title: Re: Tool to secure HANA instances as per SAP checklists
entry.content:
Hi @VincentBerg,


>I just wanted to get the word out that there is a free and open-source tool available to help securing HANA instances as per the SAP provided checklists.
SAP does not offer any external separate tools for this purpose.
The link you found (https://www.anvilsecure.com/blog/introducing-hanalyzer.html) already provides a well-summarized overview of configurations that can be implemented to achieve high security.


Best regards,
Charles

entry.title: Re: Automating Flat File Loads in SAP Datasphere Using Generic SFTP Connections
entry.content:
Hello @hudupa 

thanks a lot for this very helpful blog ... I would have needed this feature for a client of mine, already two years ago 😞

However... can you let me know a bit more about the topic of updating the file.

In case you have a SAP source system, like S4 or BW, and you create e.g. daily a new file via function module and store it on the SAP's file system (AL11), can you automate the load into DSP from there?

So, you won't need any Python or SAP Integration Suite for this use case, right?

BR, Martin

entry.title: Is It Possible to Change Price List Per Row in Sales Documents?
entry.content:
I have multiple price lists defined for my items, and I want to be able to change the price list at the row level in a sales order or sales quotation. However, the system only allows me to change the price list at the document level through the form settings.

Does anyone know if there's a way to change the price list per row in a sales document?

thanks in advance ,

Sadra

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAC Private Cloud into BDC
entry.content:
Hi Team,

If you subscribe to BDC, it comes with  BDC cockpit, datasphere tenant and SAC Tenant along with sap data bricks.

you can navigate the SAC from BDC home page itself. if suppose you have separate SAC license you wanted to use, you can connect with BDC as well. 

*In your query you mentioned SAC Private cloud tenant. no such tenant available - all SAC licenses are public cloud only, as for us i am aware.

regards,

G

entry.title: Re: GR 相关配置问题咨询
entry.content: 请问老师，为什么重分类方法不要自定义呢？

entry.title: Refresh table after execute bound action
entry.content:
i have an RAP app on top of Public Cloud with multiple views (table) which show records with different status on each tab.

I have a bound action to select row/s to update the status. Currently, status is updated but it still sits in the current table.

The expectation is after action is executed, the status of the record will change and the the current view will update making the record disappear in current table and move to another view.

I've tried using side effects but it doesn't work. Is there a way to make the tables refresh after execute of bound action?

  side effects
  {
//tried both but doesnt work
    action updateStatus affects field Status;
    action updateStatus affects $self;
  }

entry.title: Re: TCS 206C (1) on Purchase of goods
entry.content: Check SAP note 3574318 for sales and 2977148 for Purchase

entry.title: Inquiry on SAP Notes Note 3578900 - Multiple vulnerabilities in SRM Live Auction Cockpit
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Would like to seek your expert advice as I received the following notes to implement in SRM.

"A priority "Very High" SAP Note/KBA has just been released on component SRM-LA

Note 3578900 - [CVE-2025-30012] Multiple vulnerabilities in SAP Supplier Relationship Management (Live Auction Cockpit)"

For your information, this functionality has not been used by the business for quite some time. Therefore, do we still need to implement the notes related to it. What is the impact to RFX process that currently being used?

entry.title: Not able to create sales order with reference of schedule agreement VA01
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Actually, I configured a new schedule agreement for one of our clients. Now they want to create a sales order with reference to the schedule agreement, but whenever we are given all the inputs and try to create in VA01 it while saving the order, the sales order is generated, but when we are trying to open it in VA02, the system is throwing an error message like the one below. So any experts, please guide me if I missed any configuration.

SD document 1031666 is not in the database or has been archived

Regard's,

Pavan Kumar

entry.title: Re: Reusable Logger Class in ABAP – Simple Logging in Reports
entry.content: Good summary of the challenges with the application log and how to address them.

entry.title: Re: ADSO's and Composite Providers are not visible in Ana...
entry.content: Thank you for this valuable information. The problem was solved when I checked “DisableBWDirectSearch” as you said. For friends who cannot locate Technical Configuration: File -> Analysis -> Customize Analysis -> Technical Configuration

entry.title: Plug in upgrade with Stack XML taking unwanted Non-ABAP component
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We want to update the GRC plug-in for our Satellite system. However, when we try to generate the stack XML, it includes a mandatory non-ABAP component that we cannot deselect. Our goal is to upgrade only the GRC plug-in (GRCPINW V1200_750 0023 SAPK-V1223INGRCPINW SAP GRC NetWeaver Plug-In) and not the other mandatory component (igs.helper).

entry.title: Re: In AMDP, is it possible to use a SEQUENCE object? (ne...
entry.content:
Thanks. Fixed AMDP link (htm instead of html): https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-US/index.htm?file=abenamdp.htm.

I guess the restriction in AMDP is more related to the following link (list of supported object types behind USING): https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-US/index.htm?file=abapmethod_by_db_proc.htm#!ABAP_ADDITION_4@4@.

"the following database objects must be specified after USING:

  • CDS entities, such as CDS view entities, CDS DDIC-based views (obsolete), CDS table functions, and CDS hierarchies, using the name of the CDS entity.
  • Database tables and DDIC views from the ABAP Dictionary using the name defined in ABAP Dictionary.
  • Procedures and functions managed by AMDP. An AMDP procedure or function is specified using the syntax class=>meth. Here, class is the name of its AMDP class and meth is the name of the AMDP procedure implementation or function implementation."

So, no possibility to use a sequence.

entry.title: Re: Not able to create sales order with reference of sche...
entry.content: When the scheduling agreement itself is enough and sales order is not required, to create an outbound delivery, what is the Business requirement to create sales order with reference to scheduling agreement? By the way, did you maintain copy control in vtaa for those document types?

entry.title: Re: I get an Error in Function Code. Is there a solution?
entry.content:
Hi,

As I don't have access to certain catalog objects, e.g OPDN, I am unable to test it directly.
After reviewing the code theoretically, I was wondering if you could please test the following changes to see if they work:

-------------------------------------
-- FIFO mantığı ile stok tahsisi yap
DECLARE cur_row CURSOR FOR SELECT * FROM :fifo_stock;

OPEN cur_row;
LOOP
FETCH cur_row INTO cur_row_row;
IF cur_row_row IS NULL THEN
CLOSE cur_row;
LEAVE;
END IF;

IF :remaining_qty <= 0 THEN
CLOSE cur_row;
LEAVE;
END IF;

DECLARE alloc_qty DECIMAL(19,6);

-- Kullanılacak miktarı belirle
IF :cur_row_row.RemainingQty >= :remaining_qty THEN
alloc_qty := :remaining_qty;
remaining_qty := 0;
ELSE
alloc_qty := :cur_row_row.RemainingQty;
remaining_qty := :remaining_qty - :cur_row_row.RemainingQty;
END IF;

-- Sonuç tablosuna ekle
result = UNION_ALL(
:result,
SELECT
:cur_row_row.DocEntry,
:cur_row_row.DocNum,
:cur_row_row.DocDate,
:cur_row_row.BaseEntry,
:cur_row_row.BaseLine,
:cur_row_row.Quantity,
:cur_row_row.UsedQty,
:cur_row_row.RemainingQty,
:alloc_qty AS AllocationQty
FROM DUMMY
);
END LOOP;
-------------------------------------


Best regards,
Charles

entry.title: Re: Configure a Custom IAS IDP
entry.content: any solutions?

entry.title: Re: Building an Attachment Upload and Download Solution Using UploadSetwithTable Control
entry.content:
Hi @mikoaz ,

Could you please explain more? I didn't get your question - How could we get the plugins when we don't have CDS or HANA? 

If you mean you are using ABAP in the backend, then, of course, the same UI control can still be used, as UI5 technology is independent of the backend type; however, the implementation when sending the request may differ.

entry.title: HANA ODBC Connector with JWT
entry.content:
Hello experts,
is it possible to use the HANA ODBC Connector with JWT as an authentication method (assuming prior configuration of HANA)?
I have seen in the documentation that authenticationMethods can be assigned the value ‘JWT’. But shouldn't it then also be possible to specify the token? If so, which parameter is used to do this?

Best regards

Tristan

entry.title: Bringing CDQ to SAP MDG Classic Mode: Enabling Trusted Business Partner Creation with Custom DPI
entry.content:
Executive Summary

SAP MDG classic mode does not support standard DPI integration with CDQ, leaving master data stewards without access to trusted external sources during BP creation.

This blog demonstrates a custom solution that simulates DPI behavior using REST APIs and Custom List UIBB — enabling real-time Business Partner lookup from CDQ inside the Change Request UI. The result is streamlined data entry, improved data accuracy, and more efficient onboarding — even in SAP S/4HANA 2023 (on-premise, classic mode) or earlier versions.

 

Introduction

Creating trusted and error-free business partner records is a critical goal in business. This article explores an approach to achieve that goal by integrating CDQ reference data in SAP Master Data Governance (MDG) classic mode.

SAP introduced Data Provider Integration (DPI) with CDQ AG as a cloud platform, allowing master data stewards to source high-quality business partner data directly from authoritative reference sources. Initially delivered in SAP MDG, cloud edition, this functionality is also available in SAP S/4HANA 2023 under cloud-ready mode.

However, since this out-of-the-box DPI integration is only available in cloud-ready mode on SAP S/4HANA 2023, it creates a functional gap for systems running in classic mode (SAP S/4HANA 2023) as well as for earlier S/4HANA versions.

To bridge this gap and enable external data usage during business partner creation, a custom implementation is needed. This article introduces a solution where CDQ-sourced business partner suggestions are presented dynamically in a Custom List UIBB within the MDG Change Request UI, based on input fields like organization name, address, and tax number.

 

Background

Corporate Data Quality (CDQ) is a cloud-based platform that provides verified company information by connecting to official and commercial registers globally. It allows organizations to source high-quality reference data—such as legal names, addresses, tax numbers, and registration details—during master data creation.

SAP has extended its existing DPI framework to include CDQ as an out-of-the-box data provider, enabling plug-and-play access to trusted business partner data. This is available in:

  • SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition
  • SAP S/4HANA 2023 (cloud-ready mode)


Figure 1 – Technical view of Data Provider Integration with CDQ

Through this integration, master data stewards can search for business entities directly within the Manage Business Partners Fiori Application, retrieve verified information in real-time, and auto-fill business partner fields. This streamlines onboarding processes, improves data accuracy, and reduces manual maintenance effort.


Figure 2 – Data Provider Integration supporting automation in creation and change of business partner data

For details about DPI, see this SAP Blog.

 

The Limitation: No CDQ DPI in Classic Mode

While the CDQ integration via DPI delivers a streamlined way to source verified business partner data, its standard implementation is currently limited to SAP MDG cloud edition and SAP S/4HANA 2023 (cloud-ready mode). This presents a challenge for organizations using MDG in classic mode or on earlier S/4HANA versions, where the standard DPI configuration and Fiori-based integration are not available.

In such environments, master data stewards often resort to manual data entry, untrusted external sources, increasing the risk of incomplete, inconsistent records—precisely the issues CDQ is meant to solve.

The core challenge becomes:
How can CDQ reference data be leveraged within MDG classic mode, aligning with its Change Request-driven process, even when the standard DPI usage is not supported?

 

Feasible Option - Abstract

The solution presented in this article addresses that challenge by integrating CDQ through a DPI-based approach, enabling real-time access to external data within the MDG classic mode’s Change Request UI using a Custom List UIBB.


Figure 3 – An example screenshot of a Change Request with Custom List UIBB

In this example, the master data steward begins by entering basic input values—e.g., Name 1 and Country/Region—in the Business Partner Details section of the Change Request. As shown in Figure 3, once the user enters Name 1 and Country/Region, the Custom “BP Lookup” List UIBB fetches relevant business partner suggestions from CDQ dynamically.

After selecting the appropriate CDQ-sourced record, the data is transferred into the related sections, as illustrated in Figures 4 and 5.


Figure 4 – Transferred BP Details data retrieved from CDQ into Change Request UI


Figure 5 – Transferred Tax Number data retrieved from CDQ into Change Request UI

 

Some Nice-To-Have Skills

Here are some nice-to-have skills and knowledge areas for handling this topic:

ABAP programming, T-Code: SM59, SM30, STRUST, Cross-Badi derivation, Overview Page Floorplan (OVP), REST API, RFC, MDG

 

Solution in a Nutshell

The solution enables real-time use of CDQ reference data within the SAP MDG Change Request UI through a Custom List UIBB.

As users fill in key fields, such as organization name and/or address, the system fetches potential business partner records from CDQ. The list is updated automatically whenever any parameter is changed. With a single click on ‘Transfer Values’, selected CDQ data is populated into the corresponding MDG fields.

 

Implementation Steps

For our solution, we pursued the following steps:

  • Create an API Key Instance from CDQ with a Client ID and Client Secret. For more information, please visit this site.
  • Import TLS root certificate for https://api.cdq.com. For more information, check out this blog.
  • Maintain the required RFC Destinations to set up technical communication.
  • Determine the logical port as the DPI’s general RFC Destination. Configure the V_MDQDPI_RFCDEST view in SM30.
  • Create these classes to implement the logic;
    1. API Caller Class (ZCL_CDQ_API_CALLER) -> Handling API requests, communicating with CDQ
    2. Main Integration Class (ZCL_CDQ_BP_INTEGRATION) -> Prepare the request data and map the response of the API to the UIBB format
    3. Feeder Class of Custom List UIBB (ZCL_BP_GUIBB_CDQ_FEEDER) -> Maintain the data
    4. Derivation Class (ZCL_BP_CDQ_DERIVATION) -> Populate the related fields with the selected row
    5. Utilities Class (ZCL_BP_CDQ_UTILITIES) -> Collect useful methods that are used several times
  • Add a Custom List UIBB into BS_BP_ALL_OVP.

Create New API Key;


Figure 6 – Generating API Key from CDQ Portal for Secure Integration

To establish secure HTTPS communication with CDQ, the certificate for api.cdq.com must be imported via transaction STRUST. This is depicted in Figure 7, where the certificate is added under the SSL Client (Standard);


Figure 7 – Certification for CDQ API

Set up External Server HTTP Connections;


Figure 8 – RFC Connections for CDQ

The created RFC Destination Z_DPI_CDQ is assigned as the logical port for DPI’s general operation. You can see this configuration in Figure 9, which shows the entry in the V_MDQDPI_RFCDEST view;


Figure 9 – Data entry for V_MDQDPI_RFCDEST to determine logical port for general DPI operations

Remark: The following methods will be the main part of the framework, they do not include the whole picture.

The method responsible for communicating with CDQ (ZCL_CDQ_API_CALLER->CALL_API);

  METHOD call_api.

    TRY.
        DATA(rfc_destination) = get_rfc_destination( if_mdqdpi_rfc_dest_constants=>provider-cdq-operation-general-name ).

        IF rest_client IS NOT BOUND.
          DATA(http_client) = get_http_client( rfc_destination ).

          cl_http_utility=>set_request_uri( request = http_client->request
                                            uri     = api_path ).

          rest_client = NEW cl_rest_http_client( http_client ).
        ENDIF.

      CATCH cx_mdqdpi_functional_error.
        rfc_destination = get_rfc_destination( if_mdqdpi_rfc_dest_constants=>provider-cdq-operation-lookup-name ).
        IF rest_client IS NOT BOUND.
          http_client = get_http_client( rfc_destination ).
          rest_client = NEW cl_rest_http_client( http_client ).
        ENDIF.
        IF rest_client IS INITIAL.
          RAISE EXCEPTION NEW cx_mdqdpi_functional_error( textid = cx_mdqdpi_functional_error=>data_provider_setup_error ).
        ENDIF.
    ENDTRY.

    DATA(request) = build_request( payload = payload
                                   mapping = mapping ).
    rest_client->post( request ).
    result = rest_client->get_response_entity( )->get_string_data( ).
    analyze_response(
      EXPORTING
        string_response  = result
        rest_client      = rest_client                 " REST Client
      IMPORTING
        http_status_code = http_status_code
    ).

    rest_client->close( ).
    CLEAR rest_client.

  ENDMETHOD.

The method responsible for preparing the API response for Custom List UIBB (ZCL_CDQ_BP_INTEGRATION->BP_LOOK_UP);

  METHOD bp_look_up.

    DATA:
      ls_abap_format  TYPE zif_cdq_bp_integration=>gty_look_up_response,
      ls_t100_message TYPE scx_t100key.

    CLEAR:
      ev_http_status_code,
      es_cdq_golden_output,
      et_cdq_output,
      et_t100_message.

    DATA(api_caller) = zcl_cdq_api_caller=>get_instance( ).

    DATA(payload) = prepare_bp_look_up_request(
      EXPORTING
        is_cdq_attr = is_cdq_attr                 " Type for ~ BP Lookup
    ).

    TRY.
        api_caller->call_api(
          EXPORTING
            api_path         = '/sap-odm/v3/referencedata/rest/v3/businesspartners/lookup'
            payload          = payload
          IMPORTING
            result           = DATA(http_response)
            http_status_code = ev_http_status_code
        ).

      CATCH cx_mdqdpi_functional_error INTO DATA(lx_error).

*     General error message info
        CLEAR ls_t100_message.
        ls_t100_message = lx_error->if_t100_message~t100key.
        go_bp_cdq_utilities->prepare_t100_message(
          EXPORTING
            ix_error        = lx_error                 " Functional Errors
          CHANGING
            cs_t100_message = ls_t100_message                 " T100
        ).
        IF ls_t100_message IS NOT INITIAL.
          APPEND ls_t100_message TO et_t100_message.
        ENDIF.

*     Detailed error message info if it exists
        IF lx_error->previous IS NOT INITIAL.
          CLEAR ls_t100_message.
          DATA(lx_previos_error) = CAST cx_mdqdpi_functional_error( lx_error->previous ).
          ls_t100_message = lx_previos_error->if_t100_message~t100key.
          go_bp_cdq_utilities->prepare_t100_message(
            EXPORTING
              ix_error        = lx_previos_error                 " Functional Errors
            CHANGING
              cs_t100_message = ls_t100_message                 " T100
          ).
          IF ls_t100_message IS NOT INITIAL.
            APPEND ls_t100_message TO et_t100_message.
          ENDIF.
        ENDIF.
        EXIT.
    ENDTRY.

    convert_to_abap_format(
      EXPORTING
        iv_data_in_json_format = http_response
        iv_api_type            = 'LOOK_UP'                 " LOOK_UP / BANK_REL / EMAIL
      IMPORTING
        es_look_up_response    = ls_abap_format                 " BP Lookup Response Type
    ).

    convert_to_uibb_format(
      EXPORTING
        is_abap_format       = ls_abap_format
      IMPORTING
        es_cdq_golden_output = es_cdq_golden_output                 " Type for ~ BP Lookup
        et_cdq_output        = et_cdq_output                 " Table Type for ~ BP Lookup
    ).

  ENDMETHOD.

Create a Custom List UIBB to maintain trusted business partner data in Change Request UI;


Figure 10 – Custom List UIBB Component Configuration

 

Conclusion

This solution demonstrates how trusted CDQ reference data can be leveraged in SAP MDG classic mode through a custom DPI-inspired approach. By integrating REST-based API logic into a Custom List UIBB inside the Change Request UI, users can enrich business partner master data in real-time. This makes the solution ideal for on-premise S/4HANA systems aiming to improve data accuracy and reduce manual effort.

entry.title: Crystal Reports 2025 Runtime support for Visual Studio based applications
entry.content:
Hi.

Is there a v14.x.x aligned version of the Visual Studio runtime libraries needed to package up C# applications with our reports saved in Crystal Reports v2025? We currently bind to the freely available v13.x.x runtime library but I cannot locate the v14.x.x runtime library/files I have only heard of?

Please can someone indicated how we can obtain the v14.x.x runtime libraries?

Thanks.

Jay

SAP Crystal Reports, version for Visual Studio SAP Crystal Reports - SDK SAP Crystal Reports

entry.title: Re: How to Enable Mass Data Upload for a Custom Business...
entry.content:
Dear @Chuma ,

I’ve followed all the steps you provided for enabling the “Data Import” option on the Demo_Employee root node. However, I’m unable to locate the “Data Import” checkbox in the Nodes tab after selecting the Demo_Employee row. I’ve attached a screenshot below for your reference.


Could you please review the screenshot and assist me in resolving this issue? Thank you for your support!

Best Regards,
Sanjay

entry.title: Re: ABAP Call Monitor (SCMON) – Analyze usage of your code
entry.content:
Hi Olga,

Greetings!

We have SCMON enabled in our Production system and it has collected data for last 320 days. This data is aggregated in SUSG, and we can see the data available. 

At the same time we have implemented SOLMAN usage tracking but due to some error we couldn't see the usage report in SOLMAN 7.2 except for the last 2 weeks where it was initiated again. 

1. Is there any possibility of using the data snapshot from SUSG for preparing the usage report in SOLMAN?

2. If above request is not possible, how can we make use of data available in SUSG* tables to generate similar usage report within SAP via custom program or via additional notes?

3. Is it possible to upload the Snapshot into S/4 HANA POC system to do similar analysis as SOLMAN and generate the data?

Your insights will be really helpful for us and thank you very much for a detailed blog post and keeping the interactions active throughout these years.

entry.title: Manufacturer Part Number Functions in S/4HANA Cloud ERP, Public Edition
entry.content:
This blog will introduce the Manufacturer Part Number (MPN) Functions in S/4HANA Cloud ERP, Public Edition, revealing commonly used processes with screenshot. Key insights to take away, looks like a small subset of MPN is there, but major parts for inventory managed MPN numbers are not available for now.

The features covered in this article are based on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition 2502, please refer to the latest information for changes in subsequent versions.

 

Index

Product Master Data configuration

CBC Business Configuration

Business Process Detail

 

Product Master Data configuration

Create MPN material with product type Manufacture Part (HERS)

This product type is introduced in 2302 edition.

APP:  Manage Product Master Data

Product TD_LQ_22 is created referencing internal product number TD_LQ_21

 

Assign MPN material with product type Manufacture Part (HERS)

 

CBC Business Configuration

Define Manufacture Part Profile

SSCUI 106113 Define Manufacturer Part Profile

If you wish to store different prices for different MPN materials corresponding to one of your company’s own materials, you should create purchasing info records not for your company’s own materials but for the MPN materials. To be able to do so, you must specify in the MPN profile that purchasing info records can only be created for MPN materials. In this case, you will not be able to create an info record for your company’s own material.

The following is the configuration for Inventory-Managed profile and apparently less options are available.

 

Business Process Detail

External procurement with Non Inventory-Managed profile

Create Purchase Order

In this test case, we uncheck the Info Records for MPN in profile IMPN, means we only create info record for own material TD_LQ_21. Let’s create purchase order for MPN material TD_LQ_22.

APP: Create Purchase Order – Advanced

Post Goods Receipt

APP: Post goods Receipt for purchasing document

When input the PO number, own material TD_LQ_21 was brought out.

Inventory wise, company own material TD_LQ_21 stock increased by 1.

Display Material document

However, this MPN Material field is not available in material document reporting Monitor Purchase Order Items APP nor goods movement CDS view. It only appear in purchase order item CDS view with which you can customize your reporting.

If I create purchase order for own material TD_LQ_21 directly, the material document shows MPN material as itself.

 

External procurement with Inventory-Managed profile

Unfortunately, i did not find Concatenated Material No field in the following configuration and according to my testing, no difference between CALL and IMNP profile, thus, i dont think it supports Inventory-Managed MNP function in Public cloud.

 

Hope you LIKE it if it addresses your issue. After that, please feel free to comment after following my account and I will reply ASAP.

 

My recent blogs:

Advanced Intercompany Sales MTO and Variant Configuration (7DM) in S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition

Intercompany integration scenarios FAQ in Cloud ER... - SAP Community

entry.title: SolutionOrder Management / Subscription Billing - 404 Error during simulation of subscription item
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

for context im working on a Public Cloud System where we integrated SAP Subscription Billing ( as descriped in the documentation for Scope Item 57Z), so we use SAP MDI and SAP Event Mesh. I now wanted to try the End-to-End process starting with a Solution order that contains a subscription item (as descriped in the documentation for scope item 4GT).
So i created the solution order with only one product which was replicated from subscription billing before, but when i press the "Simulate" button on the item level i get the following error: "The requested resource could not be found. (HTTP 404 - Not found)".

As is understand it the Public Cloud System should request some data and calculations from subscription billing, but i dont know how i can find the issue here. For now I have checked that the communication agreement and communication system are properly created. I can also find the message with an error in the message monitioring app under the  "/CMDPR - PRDREQ_OUT" interface but no additional information. Could anyone help me on how to troubleshoot this issue ?

Best regards Lukas

entry.title: Re: Multiple Country Activation in CBC
entry.content:
Hi @ob_mike 

I see some confusion here so let me try to clarify your doubts.

with multiple company codes to set up for each country, our assumption was that we have to complete the primary finance settings and organisational structure set up before we can activate more countries.

Primary finance settings is a one time setup , once you finalize this step you can't change it again so you will have to do this once at the end of the first 5 countries batch .

Organizational structure activity must be completed for each scope extension process as long as you add new relevant countries or scenarios that require new units to be created in the workspace.  You must do this for each 5 countries batch and deploy the content to the target system before you start a new scope extension for the next 5 countries .

 

can we activate all the countries before moving on to primary finance settings and organisational structure activities in CBC?

No , never try to do this as this will result in a huge deployment and activation process will fail in the target system due to the large amount of data deployed. You should always add max 5 countries , complete open activities and deploy them to the target system. Once activation is completed you start again via Edit scope and add the next 5 countries and so on until you have them all in the target system.

Regards,

Lucian

entry.title: Re: Cannot change or update the 'Without Qty Posting' fie...
entry.content: Thanks for your answer. This is the sap note 3614718 - Without Qty Posting field is not editable after adding return request

Vielen Dank!

entry.title: Need Help Setting Up SAP BTP – Feeling Stuck
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have  started exploring SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) & while the possibilities seem exciting, I am  facing issue when it comes to the setup part. I have been trying to work through the trial account and get things going with SAP Build Apps & Cloud Foundry but I keep getting confused around role collections, entitlements & service configurations.

I have followed a few guides but either I am missing a step or things have changed from what is shown. Coming from a DevOps background, I am used to tools such as Atlassian. I just finished jira training last month & compared to that, SAP’s environment feels a bit more complex to navigate.

If anyone here could share how they got started with SAP BTP or suggest any beginner-friendly resources or videos, I would be  grateful. Even a checklist of key steps would help a ton.

Appreciate any help.

Thank you....:)

entry.title: SAP ERP Public cloud Scope items list
entry.content: where can i get or download the SAP ERP Public cloud Scope items list.

entry.title: Re: Unable to see candidates in new pipeline
entry.content:
Hi Manasa,

You will need to submit a support ticket to the support team, this does not look like a config or permission issue. Support may need to check the SOLR indexes of the new workbench in case of stale data.

Is the latest workbench only recently enabled for the first time?Please check also if this is happening on any other requisition,

In the support ticket, be sure to provide the affected company ID, support access, recruiter to proxy and job req ID.

Thanks,

Enda

entry.title: Problems creating a multitenancy app with CAP
entry.content:
Hello,

we want to create a multitenancy CAP app with Approuter and standalone HTML5 apps (html5-repo), but without portal or workzone. An example is linked (https://github.com/christopher-ketzler/book). The deployment (mta) of the app and the creation of the route works fine. Unfortunately, an “Internal Server Error” occurs when the app is called up. The following can be seen in the application router log. The app is not able to authenticate againt the subscriber subaccount. I have no clue why this happens as I changed the tenant-mode to "shared" (see below).

The app was created in the similar as described in the Cap documentation. It was developed on the BAS and deployed on a BTP trial. The xs-security.json has been extended to support multitenancy and the trial account:

"tenant-mode":"shared",

"oauth2-configuration": {

  "redirect-uris": ["https://*.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/**"]

}

The Approuter (xs-app.json) has been extended to include the link to the Fiori Elements app:

"welcomeFile": "bookui",

I have noticed that the uua tenantmode configuration listed in the HTML5 Runtime does not change to “shared” after updating the tenant. Why is this the case?

The project was created as follows:

  • cds init book –add tiny-sample
  • Creation of the Fiori Elements App (Wizzard).
  • cds add hana,xsuaa,approuter,html5-repo
  • cds add multitenancy
  • cds add mta
  • npm i (also within the mtx modul)
  • Adjustments see below.
  • mbt build
  • cf deploy mta_archive/… -f
  • Creation oft he route in the BTP Cockpit.
  • Update the tenant in the “SaaS Provisioning Service“

Regards

Christopher

entry.title: Ind Percent Average in Totals row?
entry.content:
For Comp, the percent values of fields like Merit also have a percent total next to its total amount. However, the equivalent in Variable Pay, Ind Percent (performancePercent) is a separate field from Ind Calc Amount (totalIndividualCalcAmount). The latter has a calculated total, but there is not average of all the Ind Percent values in a worksheet. Is there a way to do this? I don't see custom fields having an option to enable a total average either.

Regards,

 

Roman

entry.title: Re: Missing partner functions in the partner dropdown lis...
entry.content: Dear @freebing1973 Vincent, SAP note 716349 contains code correction, it is needed to implement it in the ABAP system. That is why you cannot find step-by-step resolutions. 716349 - Missing partner functions in the partner dropdown listbox But considering the SAP note was released at 10.03.2004, which is very old, I don't think it applies to your system. If you still see the issue, you may consider create an SAP support case to component CRM-BF-PD for further help. Best regards, Charles

entry.title: Re: How to programmatically switch detail tabs in MIGO
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

Thanks for the kudo, and just for your info, that moving the tab position is also possible in GuiXT.

 

If you want to know more about GuiXT, feel free to visit my youtube channel:

http://www.youtube.com/@Simplified-erp

 

 

 

Warm regards,

iyaua83

entry.title: Re: Not able to create sales order with reference of sche...
entry.content:
Hello @pavankumar1127 

The pop up message about update cancellation and the fact that sales orders are not really saved, indicate a serious issue in your sales order processing - sales order saving update tasks fail and that can be seen in SM13.

Most probably sales order saving fails with a short dump. Short dumps can be viewed and analyzed in ST22. You need to find the root cause of the issue. Again most probably it is a problem in some custom development like output determination. That can be found out from the short dumps. 

If you don't know how to analyze short dumps, go to ST22, get to a short dump from sales order saving (transaction VA01), download entire dump into a zip file and attach it here. Then we can say more about the problem.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Characteristics Values Hierarchy Not Visible in Product Master - Classification View
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

While creating a Material Master using the classic GUI, I can view the hierarchical structure for selecting Item Category Code under the Classification view (as shown in the attached screenshot). However, when creating a Product Master using Fiori or the Manage Product Master App, the same hierarchy is not visible - only a flat list of values is shown.

Is there any configuration or setting required to enable the same hierarchical value display in the Fiori Product Master app?

I would appreciate any insights or suggestions on how to achieve consistency across both UIs.

Thanks in Advance !

Material Master Data Classification View

Product Master Data Classification View

entry.title: Re: Error: Connection failed (RTE:[89013] Socket closed by peer
entry.content: If you connect to the HANA DB via a proxy it might be your proxy IP.

entry.title: Re: SGEN issues (objects Generation Erros/Syntax Errors)

entry.title: Re: Missing partner functions in the partner dropdown lis...
entry.content:
Dear Charles,

Thanks for your support!

Vincent

entry.title: Re: Mobile Start-Push Notification
entry.content:
By default, the Subject Name Identifier configured in the entry for SAP Build Work Zone under Applications in your Identity Authentication tenant is used by SAP Mobile Services to identify users, e.g. for push notifications. When you check the "Push Registrations" table in SAP Mobile Services, you see the values under "user name". From your provided notification settings in SAP Build Work Zone, you currently have selected "E-Mail (default)" as the identifier to deliver notifications. If in the username column another value (e.g. a UID) would be shown, this is the reason for the error message that no matching registration was found. You can also refer to SAP Note 3582623 for more information.

From there, there are multiple ways to solve this:

  • With SAP Task Center and the end-to-end configuration of the Global User Id, notifications will also make use of the Global User Id.
  • Without Task Center, you could either streamline the Subject Name Identifier to E-Mail or the S/4HANA User Id. This may include the removal of cached shadow-users on your SAP BTP Cockpit.
  • Another way would be to override the matching attribute in SAP Mobile Services.

We would recommend you reaching out to sapmobilestart@sap.com, where me and my colleagues can take a look at your case specifically and recommend the best next steps.

entry.title: Re: Establishing Inbound Connection from AWS to HANA Clou...
entry.content: This is consistent with the documentation. Service channels to HANA DBs are only supported for Neo, whereas SAP HANA Cloud is only available in CF.

entry.title: Re: User management (SU01) / Work Center / Function field...
entry.content: Dear @DanielGyr, I conducted research in the SAP knowledge base and did not find any SAP documentation (including SAP notes or KBAs) explaining how to extend this limit. Additionally, there are no past incidents (from SAP customers) attempting to extend the limit of this field either. Therefore, it appears that all SAP customers are using the standard feature. Back to your question, I think you need to give "a short job function" as a workaround. Best regards, Charles

entry.title: Re: Characteristics Values Hierarchy Not Visible in Produ...
entry.content:
Hello @Leelamohan 

That is yet another feature not supported by Fiori UI.

As per SAP Help on Manage Product Master

 

As per SAP Help on Classification Reuse UI Component

As per note 2370481 - Restrictions for Classification embedded in Fiori applications

 

I guess there is really nothing you can do about that beside reporting it as a missing feature to SAP support or to the customer influence program.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Error: Connection failed (RTE:[89013] Socket closed by peer
entry.content: @KHUSH3, if you connect to HANA DB instance via a proxy you have to enter the proxy IP. You may try a service like https://whatismyipaddress.com/ to find this IP.

entry.title: Integration Suite RFC Call with table-data_element as import parameter
entry.content:
I have a problem with a rfc call from integration suite to ERP System. The rfc function has as import parameter a table type and inside it a data element with string 4. Looks like this:

The imported wsdl part looks like this:

System generated automatically the "item" element that we fill with a string in mapping.

If we send the data to erp the intern table has the correct amount of rows but without any values inside:

Do you have any ideas? For me it looks like a bug in integration suite or a restriction in rfc adapter.

entry.title: BEx Web Application Error while loading the application (return value "4")
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We have this issue in production portal where, when users run the WAD reports they are getting error "BEx Web Application Error while loading the application "" (return value "4")

The issue is intermittent and is seen only against the WAD reports.

entry.title: Re: How to Import Data from DataBricks Spark on AWS to SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Wu-Dongxue,
thanks for your blog.
If we choose the Databricks connection type in the properties file we are getting a different looking connection configuration screen in SAC. We have to separately specify http path and schema.
While creating the connection works we can not load any data. Instead we are getting an unspecified error in SAC. In the Databricks SQL Warehouse monitoring the error is shown as "Configuration /default is not available".
Any ideas about that?

Best regards

Stefan

entry.title: India TCS/TDS withholding report after executing line items are showing in RED Colour
entry.content:
'India Withholding Tax (TDS/TCS) Status Report” Fiori tile, data entries within the report are being displayed with a red background color, indicating an error or exception state. However, the system does not provide any specific error message or reason for the red highlighting.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Match-code button not appearing on Filter of extended field on a standard value help
entry.content:
We have extended the standard Value Help "C_MM_MaterialValueHelp" with the _Material.ProductHierarchy and it's description using an association to a custom Value Help (which is the Value Help of the Product Hierarchy in the filter options). 

When trying to access the field as a filter when using the Material Value Help, the field does not have the Match-Code button to allow access to our custom value help for the Product Hierarchy. 

Note that "@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition:" has been used to link the custom value help to the extended field. 

What have I tried till now: 

  1. Compared with existing filters
  2. Cleared cache, global and local

Did anyone come across a similar situation and how were you able to resolve the issue? 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: India TCS/TDS withholding report after executing line...
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

Kindly note that after executing the TDS/TCS report from the 'India Withholding Tax (TDS/TCS) Status Report - India' app, certain line items are highlighted in red, indicating that the challan has not been completed for the respective document. Please refer the below help documents challan process for TCS and TDS,

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/634261119fec4d58970471f2c4a9a740/bd0ad854ebbd4cd094fdb6441245db8a.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/634261119fec4d58970471f2c4a9a740/3a6d6241949f48e6a4d4e1512b2201d7.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION

 

Best regards,

Atanu
SAP Support - S/4HANA Cloud

entry.title: Re: Could not determine ERP stock data for: E211 G1000 F2
entry.content: Dear @freebing1973 Vincent, Based on the error message, I conducted research in the SAP knowledge base but did not find a direct solution. Given that this question was posted two months ago without any answers, if you are still encountering the error, I recommend creating a component SCM-EWM for a quicker resolution. Best regards, Charles

entry.title: Re: Get Column details of a calculation view in HANA
entry.content:
Thanks! For me this worked the best with the correct column ordering:

 

SELECT
	SCHEMA_NAME,
	CATALOG_NAME,
	CUBE_NAME,
	COLUMN_NAME,
	DESCRIPTION
FROM 
	"_SYS_BI"."BIMC_PROPERTIES"
WHERE 
	CAPTION = 'models.standard::CV_...'
ORDER BY "ORDER"

entry.title: Hello SAP Community!
entry.content: My Name is Ashutosh Pandey, I am SAP BASIS HANA Specialist. Working in HCLTech. I have total 12 years of relevant experience in SAP Basis, HANA, Solman, S/4HANA etc. etc. I have worked on several projects like SAP Support, AMS, Migration, Conversion and Implementations in my career.

entry.title: Re: Problem using method ADD_PROTOCOL_ENTRY in "handle_data_changed"
entry.content:
I did this to suppress the protocol , but my fields are high lighted in red now . How to remove this ?

Regards,

Bharathi

entry.title: SAP GRC - risk owner stage are triggered before all role owner related stage completes
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Within SAP GRC 12, we have different path at role owner stage to assess the different role owner scenario (e.g: Whether requestor ID is role owner as role owner will not be able to approve their own assignments). And also, a path for roles which are pre-approved (default assigned roles).

However, we encounter an issue where the request would partially redirect to risk owner stage if either one of the mention paths completes.

Referring to the screen shot, the path Z_ROLE_OWNER_BYPASS at role owner stage was approved and it was partially redirected to Z_SOD_REV (risk owner stage), however the other role owner stage path Z_NEW_CHG_ACCT is still yet completed where the resulted risks could be removed if one of the role owner rejects the assignment.

The expected outcome is that the risk owner stage should only trigger upon the completion of all role owner stage, which would then present the accurate access risks. Could any experts kindly share whether this can be achieved in standard configurations?  

Thank you.
